description.value:
Frequency once per day

You've learned to hone your psychic abilities to create a bespoke hive mind. You let out a psychic battle cry that links yourself and up to 10 allies within range of your limited telepathy into a temporary hive mind for 3 rounds, allowing them to communicate telepathically with everyone else in the hive mind.

You and the allies in your hive mind become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] for 3 rounds and can use the extra action only to Step, Stride, or prepare to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Aid]. For the duration, you and all allies in your hive mind can't be flanked. If an ally in your hive mind uses a ranged Strike against a target being flanked by two other allies in your hive mind, that target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] to that Strike.

Allies who leave the range of your limited telepathy lose all benefits of being in your hive mind as long as they remain outside of your limited telepathy.
